name: Trifortressops
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>要</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>犀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> トリケライナー
desc: During either player's turn, if your opponent Summoned 3 or more monsters this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If Summoned this way, it is unaffected by other cards' effects, but loses 500 DEF during each player's Standby Phase.
mnst_eff: During either player's turn, if your opponent Summoned 3 or more monsters this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If Summoned this way, it is unaffected by other cards' effects, but loses 500 DEF during each player's Standby Phase.
eff: During either player's turn, if your opponent Summoned 3 or more monsters this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If Summoned this way, it is unaffected by other cards' effects, but loses 500 DEF during each player's Standby Phase.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
